rationale: Section 12.013 is a framework statute listing provisions applicable to home-rule school districts. The homestead exemption change operates through Tax Code §11.13(b) and school funding formulas, not conflicting with this section's enumerated applicability provisions.
quote: (M) computation and distribution of state aid under Chapters 31, 43, and 48;
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed Tax Code change affects school district revenue and state aid calculations indirectly, but §12.013 merely enumerates which title provisions apply to home-rule districts; it does not set exemption amounts or funding formulas itself.
